title: May 17th, 2021 (2)

- daily notes
    - my 5 communities

        - family
            - family work
                - }
        - professional
            -  #professional
                - when i say i'm an alien lyrics
                    - when i say i'm an alien
                    - i mean the space i'm in
                    - is unavailable to even your sm[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]est scientists
                    - [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ists are the architect of stargates
                    - and our fates depend on whether or not
                    - you're gonna keep trying to send men with guns through them
                    - making absurd demands
                    - threatening punishment i don't understand
                    - but sure can feel
                    - i'm as superstitious as the rest of y'all
                    - my god contains hell too
                    - i can show and tell you
                    - or moan and yell to get through
                    - throw an elbow to say hell no if i have to
                    - but i hate to cuz i don't hate you i just ain't you
                    - and it makes no sense to you
                    - cuz i'm not an angel sent to you
                    - like all those e[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]hly stations said to you
                    - i'm a deeply strange individual
                    - from a place you can't get to
                    - i went through great pains to reach your planet
                    - to share this message to anyone who can understand it
                    - i meant it when i said it but the passage across the plenum
                    - i couldn't plan it
                    - remember that when you get it
